page_content:
Prerequisite: GVPT1 70.

Credit Only Granted for. GVPT377 or GVPT388W.

Formerly: GVPT388W.

GVPT379 Topics in American Politics (3 Credits) The study of topics in American politics. Repeatable to: 6 credits if content differs.

GVPT386 Experiential Learning (3-6 Credits) Restriction: Permission of BSOS-Government & Politics department; and Junior standing or higher.
